pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven.build.sourceVersion property to Java 17 for consistent source version reporting.
pom.xml.why_exists: Inconsistency between compiler settings and build source version property can cause metadata mismatches in build artifacts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update swagger-ui dependency version from 3.37.0 to 3.38.0.
Update project version to 7.4.1-SNAPSHOT as part of the release cycle.
Update SCM connection URLs from SSH to HTTPS.
Add jetty.httpPort property to configure the Jetty server port for integration tests.
Exclude source map files from the unpacked swagger-ui dependencies.
Remove Bamboo-specific manifest entries from the WAR archive configuration.
Update Jetty plugin configuration to use start-war goal and disable scanning.
Update distribution management repository IDs and URLs to public Alfresco repositories.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add API endpoint to retrieve storage properties for content nodes.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/storage-info/{contentPropName}':
    get:
      x-alfresco-since: "7.2.0"
      tags:
        - storage-info
      summary: Retrieve storage properties for given content

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add API endpoint to retrieve storage properties for versioned content.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/versions/{versionId}/storage-info/{contentPropName}':
    get:
      x-alfresco-since: "7.2.0"
      tags:
        - storage-info
      summary: Retrieve storage properties for given version content

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add API endpoint to request archiving of content.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/storage-info/{contentPropName}/archive':
    post:
      x-alfresco-since: "7.2.0"
      tags:
        - storage-info
      summary: Request to send given content to archive

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add API endpoint to request archiving of versioned content.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/versions/{versionId}/storage-info/{contentPropName}/archive':

      x-alfresco-since: "7.2.0"
      tags:
        - storage-info
      summary: Request to send given version content to archive

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/storage-info/{contentPropName}/archive-restore':

      x-alfresco-since: "7.2.0"
      tags:
        - storage-info
      summary: Request to restore given content from archive

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add API endpoint to request restoration of archived versioned content.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
'/nodes/{nodeId}/versions/{versionId}/storage-info/{contentPropName}/archive-restore':

      x-alfresco-since: "7.2.0"
      tags:
        - storage-info
      summary: Request to restore given version content from archive

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Deprecate the request password reset endpoint.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.before:
post:
      x-alfresco-since: "5.2.1"
      tags:
        - people
      summary: Request password reset
      description: |
        **Note:** this endpoint is available in Alfresco 5.2.1 and newer versions.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
post:
      deprecated: true
      x-alfresco-since: "5.2.1"
      tags:
        - people
      summary: Request password reset
      description: |
        **Note:** this endpoint is deprecated as of Alfresco 7.1, and will be removed in the future.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Deprecate the reset password endpoint.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.before:
post:
      x-alfresco-since: "5.2.1"
      tags:
        - people
      summary: Reset password
      description: |
        **Note:** this endpoint is available in Alfresco 5.2.1 and newer versions.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:
post:
      deprecated: true
      x-alfresco-since: "5.2.1"
      tags:
        - people
      summary: Reset password
      description: |
        **Note:** this endpoint is deprecated as of Alfresco 7.1, and will be removed in the future.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add count and description fields to Tag definition

      id:
        type: string
      tag:
        type: string
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:

      id:
        type: string
        description: The identifier for the tag.
      tag:
        type: string
        description: The unique name of the tag.
      count:
        type: number
        description: The number of nodes that this tag has been applied to.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Refactor DirectAccessUrl definitions to include attachment flag and remove validFor

    type: object
    properties:
      expiresAt:
        type: string
        format: date-time
      validFor:
        description: |
          The length of time in seconds that the url is valid for.
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.after:

    type: object
    properties:
      attachment:
        type: boolean
        description: URL type (embedded/attachment).
  DirectAccessUrlEntry:
    type: object
...  
  DirectAccessUrl:
    type: object
...  
      expiresAt:
        type: string
        format: date-time
        description: The direct access URL would become invalid when the expiry date is reached
